title: Lab 40: Script Arguments and Conditionals
description: Create a small shell script that processes arguments and returns the correct exit status

tasks: Create the executable script /usr/local/bin/usercheck40 on clientvm.
The script must accept one username argument.
If the user exists, print EXISTS: username to standard output and exit with status 0.
If the user does not exist, print MISSING: username to standard output and exit with status 1.
hints: Use an if test against the passwd database or the id command.
solution_outline: Process the first positional parameter and return the proper exit code.
